headline: Super vs Orchids

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: A fair, editorial comparison for people evaluating Orchids alongside Super. Orchids focuses on messaging-first AI experiences, while Super is built for personal AI agents that can operate real computers and reuse a computer-use cache—making repeated workflows faster and more cost‑effective. We also place both products in the broader agent landscape alongside Folk, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok.
